d:
Ludovic generates a field of everblooms with a total healing amount equal to [[1200%]] of his current ATK at his position, restoring HP for adjacent allies by up to [[150%]]<ATK> per second. Ludovic is [[unaffected]] while generating the everbloom field. The everbloom field will wither when its healing amount depletes but will restore [[100%]]<ATK> per second and revive when the healing amount is full.
Active. Ludovic moves the everbloom field to a designated tile for it to release 3 healing waves, each restoring HP for all allies within 2 tiles by [[110%]]<ATK>. This takes effect even when the everbloom field is withered.
Increases the healing amount of each healing wave to [[120%]]<ATK>.
Increases the healing amount of each healing wave to [[130%]]<ATK>.
Increases the healing amount of each healing wave to [[140%]]<ATK>.
Increases the healing amount of each healing wave to [[150%]]<ATK>.

Whenever a non-summoned enemy on the battlefield loses [[40%]]<HP> of their HP, the everbloom field will absorb [[15%]]<HP> of their max HP, up to [[350%]]<ATK>, as nutrients to restore its healing amount.
Active. Ludovic hurls everblooms at the enemy with the highest accumulated damage dealt, making them lose HP equal to [[40%]]<ATK> per second over the next [[4]]s.
Increases the target's lost HP per second to [[45%]]<ATK>.
Increases the target's lost HP per second to [[50%]]<ATK>.
Increases the target's lost HP per second to [[55%]]<ATK>.
Ludovic moves the everbloom field near the [[weakest]] ally and absorbs [[9%]] of the nearest non-summoned enemy's HP, up to [[250%]]<ATK>, to restore the everbloom field's healing amount.
Increases the amount of absorbed HP to [[10%]].
Increases the amount of absorbed HP to [[11%]].
Increases the amount of absorbed HP to [[12%]].
Ludovic increases his Healing by [[9]] during battle. His Healing will increase by an extra [[2]] when the everbloom field accumulates a healing amount equal to [[2400%]]<ATK>.
Ludovic increases his Healing by [[11]] during battle. His Healing will increase by an extra [[3]] when the everbloom field accumulates a healing amount equal to [[2400%]]<ATK>.
Ludovic increases his Healing by [[14]] during battle. His Healing will increase by an extra [[4]] when the everbloom field accumulates a healing amount equal to [[2400%]]<ATK>.

Every [[2]] times the everbloom field absorbs nutrients through Lifeweaver's Blooms, it will produce an Ephemeral Berry that explodes after a short delay, dealing [[100%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies and restoring [[130%]]<ATK> HP for all allies within range.
Increases damage dealt to [[110%]]<ATK> and HP restored to [[140%]]<ATK>.

Permanently enhances the everbloom field upon the first [[4]] times it absorbs nutrients, restoring its healing amount by [[50%]]<ATK> per second. This takes effect even when the everbloom field is withered.
Increases damage dealt to [[120%]]<ATK> and HP restored to [[150%]]<ATK>.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first ally to drop below [[40%]] HP is healed for [[160%]]<ATK> HP and granted a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: Whenever an enemy steps into the everbloom field, they will instantly take [[120%]]<ATK> damage and be stunned for [[3]]s. This effect can be triggered once for each enemy every [[12]]s.
